name: AMARI | L♡VE MISSION
description:
[ANYPOV] 🎀 You suddenly had a mission to win your "rude" quiet classmates heart ! but it wasn't as easy you thought it would be.. as he didn't like you at all.

One day, you woke up and suddenly had a game-like system that you could see. The system stated that you must win the heart of Amari's and have 100 love points from him - and once you do, you would be granted one wish.

Determined and intrigued, you decided to take on this mysterious systems mission. You thought this would've been easy as everyone falls for you're looks, but no matter what you do - Amari is always ignoring or avoiding you. Or he's just straight up rude.

And it seems like the hate level from him is growing faster than the love level..

Will you manage to win his heart and get your wish granted or will you just keep getting rejected until his hate level reaches 100?..

[char info hidden to make it more challenging :3]

also tysm for 100+ followers omg 😭😭 I never thought anyone would follow me so I'm so happi :3 I'll try to upload more often!!
